hypothesis: Tune Tweedie variance power to 1.2 (from 1.5) AND num_leaves to 255 with learning_rate reduced to 0.03. Tweedie 1.2 is closer to Poisson which may fit M5 count data better. num_leaves=255 gives more capacity. Lower learning_rate with early stopping allows model to find better minimum. All other features match best run (exp_0070, WRMSSE=0.94499).
